profile.name: Eyosiyas Tadele
profile.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer | Founding Engineer | AI & Distributed Systems Engineer

overview.headline: Senior Full-Stack Engineer and Founding Engineer building scalable AI-powered distributed systems

summary.short: Senior Full-Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, AI-powered applications, and cloud-native platforms.
summary.medium: Experienced in Node.js, NestJS, React, Next.js, TypeScript, and distributed architectures. Specialized in microservices, event-driven systems, fintech infrastructure, blockchain integrations, and AI-enhanced platforms. Currently co-founding Habesha Network, a multi-vertical marketplace and community ecosystem.
summary.long: Senior Full-Stack Engineer and Founding Engineer with deep expertise in scalable backend architecture, distributed systems, AI integration, and cloud-native engineering. Co-founding Habesha Network (habeshanetwork.com), a unified marketplace and community platform supporting e-commerce, real estate listings, jobs, professional services, events, meetups, blogging, and social/community features. Strong background in microservices, Kafka-based event streaming, Redis caching, API design, and AI-powered automation systems. Proven experience delivering fintech infrastructure, blockchain integrations, real-time systems, and enterprise-grade applications using Node.js, NestJS, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenAI technologies.

projects.title: Habesha Network
projects.description: Unified multi-vertical marketplace and community ecosystem supporting e-commerce, real estate listings, jobs, professional services, community meetups, events, blogging, and social features. Built scalable search/discovery systems, listing infrastructure, trust systems, and AI-assisted workflows.

projects.title: Habesha Service
projects.description: Professional services marketplace connecting clients with service providers through mobile-first design, scalable APIs, and smooth UX architecture.

projects.title: YellowCard Crypto Exchange Backend
projects.description: Mission-critical backend systems for a crypto exchange platform supporting real-time transaction processing, cloud scalability, and secure infrastructure.

projects.title: FinHub Core Banking Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade banking and fintech infrastructure platform with AI-powered compliance automation, transaction validation, fraud detection, and real-time risk scoring.

projects.title: Taxiye Ride-Hailing Platform
projects.description: Ride-hailing application with real-time ride management, GPS tracking, and payment integrations.

projects.title: CV Bot
projects.description: Serverless AI-powered CV assistant chatbot with a full monorepo architecture. Features a Next.js static frontend deployed on S3 + CloudFront, a FastAPI backend running on AWS Lambda as a container image, RAG via Qdrant vector search, session memory persisted in S3, and LLM routing through OpenRouter. Infrastructure is fully codified in Terraform with automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions supporting staging and production environments.
features: Next.js static export on S3 + CloudFront
Terraform-managed infra (S3, ECR, Lambda, HTTP API, CloudFront)
GitHub Actions deploy pipeline (staging + production environments)

projects.title: CareTriage AI
projects.description: Full-stack AI-powered healthcare intake and triage platform. Patients submit symptoms through a Next.js UI, which are processed by a FastAPI backend using OpenAI and rule-based triage floors to deliver structured clinical assessments. Features Clerk authentication, PostgreSQL in production with SQLite for local dev, and deployment flexibility across Vercel serverless and standalone server environments.
features: PostgreSQL with SQLite fallback for local dev
FastAPI serverless on Vercel + standalone Render/Railway/Fly support

projects.title: AlexFin.ai
projects.description: AI financial intelligence platform featuring a Next.js frontend with Clerk auth, FastAPI on AWS Lambda via Mangum, Supabase (Postgres + pgvector), and OpenRouter LLM routing. Implements a multi-agent backend (planner, tagger, reporter), asynchronous job processing via AWS SQS, portfolio and position management, Langfuse observability, and Polygon market data integration. Fully provisioned with Terraform and released exclusively via GitHub Actions CI/CD.
features: Asynchronous job processing with AWS SQS
Supabase Postgres + pgvector for vector search
Terraform-managed AWS infra (Lambda, SQS, S3, CloudFront, ECR)
GitHub Actions CI/CD (test → image → Terraform → S3 → CloudFront)

projects.title: BidForge
projects.description: AI-powered proposal generation platform that transforms client briefs — from formal RFPs to short job posts — into structured, editable proposals. Features a 5-node proposal DAG (Draft, Review, Timeline, Insights, Memory), dual Enterprise and Freelance win modes, and a reusable intelligence library that strengthens future drafts from saved past wins. Built as a Turborepo monorepo with Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend.
features: 5-node proposal generation DAG (Draft, Review, Timeline, Insights, Memory)
Enterprise (long-form sectioned) and Freelance (concise hook-first) proposal modes
AI-generated draft, review analysis, timeline, and insights
Intelligence library for reusable language from past wins
Turborepo monorepo with shared agents, prompts, schemas, and web-sdk packages

experience.summary: Leading architecture and engineering for a unified marketplace and community platform with scalable backend systems and AI-enhanced features.
Built microservices, fintech integrations, AI systems, and event-driven architectures using Kafka, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Led automation testing, performance testing, regression testing, and QA engineering for distributed systems.
Built SSR React applications, scalable APIs, dashboards, and CI/CD infrastructure.
Developed CMS systems, APIs, dashboards, and performance-optimized frontend applications.
Built full-stack systems, WordPress platforms, and automation testing pipelines.
